title: Audit Findings
description: Validates independent audit findings from report review. Each record captures findings, corrections, and a pass/fail decision against the research report artifacts.

report_artifacts.description: File paths of the report artifacts that were audited.

category.description: Category of the finding (e.g. 'missing_source', 'unsubstantiated_claim', 'misattributed_citation', 'calculation_error', 'mixed_products', 'inconsistent_unit', 'unsupported_inference'). Use "unknown" when uncategorized.

location.description: Location in the report where the issue was found (e.g. section name, table number, or artifact path with line reference).

recommendation.description: Recommended action to resolve the finding.

findings.description: Audit findings ordered by severity. Empty array if no findings were identified.

original.description: The original wording as it appeared in the report.

corrected_wording.description: Wording corrections applied or recommended. Empty array if no wording changes are needed.

auditor_notes.description: Additional observations from the auditor not captured by individual findings.

requires_human_review.description: Whether the audit identified issues that require human judgment to resolve.
